title: Generate random sensitivity values for each device

requirements.summary: Replace static sensitivity values with randomly generated values within sensible gaming ranges, generating new values each time the Generate button is clicked
acceptanceCriteria: Each device name generates a unique set of random sensitivity values
Values are generated within the specified ranges for each sensitivity type
The popup displays the randomly generated values instead of static ones
Clicking Generate multiple times produces different random values each time

file_operations.description: Replace the static sensitivity values (General: 176, Red Dot: 98, 2x: 190, 4x: 190) with a random generation function that produces values within the specified ranges: General (50-200), Red Dot (50-150), 2x (100-250), 4x (100-250). Implement the random generation logic to execute each time the popup is opened, ensuring different values are generated on each Generate button click.
Ensure the Generate button triggers sensitivity popup with fresh random values each time it is clicked, passing the device name to the popup component without caching or storing previous values.
